name: seo-copywriter-pro
description: Agente especializado em criação massiva de conteúdo SEO seguindo a metodologia James/Diesel Dudes. Use para criar 50+ páginas otimizadas rapidamente, gerar artigos em batch, traduzir para múltiplos idiomas, e rankear no Google em 30 dias. Ideal para sites de serviços locais, profissionais liberais, médicos, advogados, e qualquer negócio que precise dominar SEO local. Triggers: criar páginas SEO, gerar conteúdo em massa, rankear no Google, SEO local, criar artigos batch.
capabilities: Generate 50+ SEO-optimized pages using proven methodology
Create keyword research tables by intent category (emergency, service, problem, location, authority)
Build complete page templates with meta tags, H1 structure, and internal linking
Validate pages against SEO checklist (title length, description, content length, FAQ, schema)
author: 1bertogit
securitySummary: All 379 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. MD5 hashing is used for legitimate duplicate content detection, markdown code blocks are incorrectly flagged as shell execution, keyword research tables are misidentified as system reconnaissance, and API key handling is standard configuration for PageSpeed integration. This is a legitimate SEO copywriting skill with no security risks.
valueStatement: Create 50+ SEO-optimized pages quickly for local businesses, medical practices, and service providers. This agent follows proven SEO methodologies to help rank in Google within 30 days.
limitations: Requires user input for business-specific content and copy
Does not perform live keyword volume analysis
Does not automatically submit pages to search engines
Does not generate images or visual content

useCases.title: Local service pages
useCases.description: Generate location-specific service pages for multi-location businesses

useCases.title: Procedure content
useCases.description: Create detailed procedure pages for medical and cosmetic services

useCases.title: Bulk article generation
useCases.description: Produce large volumes of SEO blog content efficiently

promptTemplates.title: Basic service page
promptTemplates.prompt: Create an SEO page for /servicos/[service-name]/ with keyword [main keyword], targeting [audience]. Include H1, meta description under 160 chars, FAQ section with 5 questions, and MedicalProcedure schema.

promptTemplates.title: Location pages
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate location pages for [city-1], [city-2], [city-3] for [service name]. Use the batch generator template with brand [brand name], service [service], and CTAs for /contato/

promptTemplates.title: Blog articles
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a 2000+ word blog article about [topic] with keyword [primary keyword]. Include H2s for [secondary keywords], internal links to /servicos/, and FAQ schema.

promptTemplates.title: Full site audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the Pele SEO auditor on ./src/app directory. Generate an HTML report with all issues, duplicate content detection, and orphan page analysis.

bestPractices: Use high-intent keywords where users are ready to take action
Create unique content per location instead of copying templates
Include 5-7 FAQ questions per page with schema markup
Maintain consistent internal linking across all pages
antiPatterns: Do not duplicate content across multiple pages without canonical tags
Do not use thin content under 1500 words for service pages
Do not forget alt text on images or canonical URLs
Do not skip hreflang tags for multilingual content

faq.question: How many pages can this skill generate?
faq.answer: The batch generator can create unlimited pages from a JSON configuration file.

faq.question: Does it create content automatically?
faq.answer: It generates page structure and templates. You provide the specific copy and business details.

faq.question: What SEO elements are included?
faq.answer: Title, meta description, H1-H2 structure, internal links, FAQ schema, and canonical URLs.

faq.question: Can I validate existing pages?
faq.answer: Yes, use pele-seo-auditor.py to validate pages against SEO checklist and generate reports.

faq.question: Does it support multiple languages?
faq.answer: Yes, templates support PT-BR, EN, and ES with hreflang configuration.

faq.question: What frameworks does it support?
faq.answer: Primary support for Astro 5.x with React, also works with generic HTML/JSX projects.
